evals.prompt: validate the GitHub Actions workflow file at skills/actionlint/evals/test-workflow.yml using the actionlint skill
evals.expected_output: Report showing workflow validation errors with categories and fixes
expectations: Output references running actionlint or workflow validation
Output identifies specific errors like invalid action refs, expression errors, or syntax issues
Output suggests concrete fixes for each error found

evals.prompt: validate all GitHub Actions workflow files in this repository using the actionlint skill
evals.expected_output: Validation report covering all workflow files in .github/workflows/
expectations: Output references actionlint or workflow validation
Output scans .github/workflows/ directory for workflow files
Output reports validation results (pass or fail with details)

evals.prompt: check if my GitHub Actions workflow has any security issues using the actionlint skill
evals.expected_output: Security-focused validation identifying untrusted input usage and other security concerns
expectations: Output references security checks, shell injection, or untrusted input
Output identifies the use of untrusted context in run blocks or suggests environment variables
Output provides fix guidance for security issues found
